import { GLOBAL_SEROVAL, GLOBAL_TSR } from './constants.js'; import { TsrSsrGlobal } from './types.js'; import { AnyRouter } from '../router.js'; declare global { interface Window { [GLOBAL_TSR]?: TsrSsrGlobal; [GLOBAL_SEROVAL]?: any; } } export declare function hydrate(router: AnyRouter): Promise<any>;
